question: Give the flight numbers of flights arriving in Aberdeen.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.FlightNo FROM FLIGHTS AS T1 JOIN AIRPORTS AS T2 ON T1.DestAirport   =  T2.AirportCode WHERE T2.City  =  "Aberdeen"
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.num_1 FROM table_3 AS T1 JOIN table_2 AS T2 ON T1.fk_2 = T2.pk_1 WHERE T2.text_1 = 'Aberdeen'
raw_response: SELECT T1.num_1 FROM table_3 AS T1 JOIN table_2 AS T2 ON T1.fk_2 = T2.pk_1 WHERE T2.text_1 = 'Aberdeen'
